titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of Development, Yale University, Records
Office of Development, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday April 17, 2021 at 07:53

did.unittitle: Office of Development, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records document donations, gift agreements, and monies given to Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 7-A (YRG 7-A), Records of Yale officers and offices responsible for development policy and administration.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of Development, Yale University, Records (RU 891). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records document donations, gift agreements, and monies given to Yale.

did.unittitle: Donor and gift agreement records and pooled income files

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

did.unittitle: University trust agreements and fund records

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

did.unittitle: Letter and memorandum concerning scholarship at the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute from King Carl Gustav XVI

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only.
